title: Melody's Jellyfish (Glow Squid Replacement)
description: ♪ A simple replacement for the glow squid to look like a jellyfish ~
body:
## ♪ Jellyfish to Glow Squid Replacement ~

I always felt like the glow squid should've been a jellyfish instead.

(Made this on a whim, it's not fully polished)

## [!IMPORTANT]
This pack has been tested to work on **OptiFine 1.18.1 HD U H5** and higher OR EMF/ETF.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/yYWC-V9Ce74" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
